examples.english: ˹They are˺ those who donate in prosperity and adversity.

examples.text: إن أصابته سراء شكر فكان خيراً له، وإن أصابته ضراء صبر فكان خيراً له
examples.english: If prosperity attends him, he expresses gratitude to Allah and that is good for him; and if adversity befalls him, he endures it patiently and that is better for him.
